title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Indian Oil Corporation

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Indian Oil Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Indian Oil Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indian Oil Corporation:
Indian Oil Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation!
